category_sources: Official Rasqal site describes it as an RDF query language library supporting SPARQL query construction and execution.
source_facts.description says rasqal is an RDF query library.
display_name_sources: Official Rasqal site title is Rasqal RDF Query Library.
docs_sources: Official Rasqal page includes overview, installation, release notes, and source links.
Official Rasqal site links to API Reference and Rasqal API documentation.
repo_sources: Official Rasqal Sources section says development GIT sources can be browsed on GitHub or checked out from github.com/dajobe/rasqal.
Official Rasqal site links to GIT sources on GitHub.
tags_sources: Official Rasqal site describes SPARQL query language support and RDF query execution.
source_facts.description identifies an RDF query library.
